ind.title: Esai Siswa SMA
ind.prompt:
Please write a narrative essay of about 800 words. The essay should have an introduction, three distinct sections, and a conclusion. Each section should focus on a single event related to the main theme, which should be present throughout the essay. 

1. For the first section, focus on detailed descriptions of a specific skill or technique, including its artistic beauty and the joy of trying it for the first time.
2. In the second section, describe an innovative idea or concept, including details of its implementation and the deeper insights gained from the innovation.
3. The third section should revolve around a deeper aspect, such as cultural heritage, self-worth, or responsibility.

Before starting the essay, please share your interpretation of the title, including its surface and deeper meanings, and how they can be related to specific events or objects. Respond in Indonesian. Then, provide an outline of the essay, including the introduction, the main points and events for each of the three sections, and the conclusion.The title of the essay is [XXX], and the material is [YYY].
ind.description: Tulis esai naratif sekitar 800 kata dengan gaya siswa sekolah menengah. Dikontribusikan oleh @Qizhen-Yang.
ind.remark: Artikel yang dihasilkan oleh prompt ini mencerminkan gaya penulisan siswa sekolah menengah Tiongkok. Dikontribusikan oleh @Qizhen-Yang.

metaDescription: Membangun komunitas? Strategi untuk engagement dan moderasi!

faq.q: Apakah esai SMA yang ditulis AI bisa dapat nilai tinggi?
faq.a: Strukturnya sesuai standar penilaian (3 lapis, alur utama alur tersembunyi, sentuh tema), bisa dapat nilai menengah atas. Tapi nada AI yang mudah dikenali guru penilai (terlalu rapi, kurang jejak pribadi) bisa dikurangi poin. Pakai sebagai outline rujukan. Kasus nyata harus dari pengalaman sendiri.

Bisa menggali ke kedalaman standar seperti 'pelestarian budaya, nilai diri, tanggung jawab'. Tapi mudah jatuh ke klise. Setelah dapat interpretasi, tambahkan 'hindari klise ujian seperti melestarikan tradisi atau berani bertanggung jawab, ekspresikan dengan detail konkret'. Bisa membebaskan tulisan dari template.
